function_v0.doc:
Initializes the Beacon contract by setting the initial admin and unpausing the access to the
collateral.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.
- `admin`: The initial admin of the Beacon.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Gets the current admin of the Beacon.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
The current admin of the Beacon.
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc: Adds a coordinator to the Beacon requiring the authorization of the admin to execute.\n- `env`: The environment of the contract.\n- `coordinator`: The address of the coordinator to add.
function_v0.name: add_coordinator

function_v0.doc: Removes a coordinator from the Beacon requiring the authorization of the admin to execute.\n- `env`: The environment of the contract.\n- `coordinator`: The address of the coordinator to remove.
function_v0.name: remove_coordinator

function_v0.doc:
Checks if the access to the collateral is paused.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
`true` if the access to the collateral is paused, `false` otherwise.
function_v0.name: is_access_collateral_paused

function_v0.doc: Pauses the access to the collateral for all coordinators requiring the authorization of the\nadmin to execute.\n- `env`: The environment of the contract.
function_v0.name: pause_access_collateral

function_v0.doc: Unpauses the access to the collateral for all coordinators requiring the authorization of the\nadmin to execute.\n- `env`: The environment of the contract.
function_v0.name: unpause_access_collateral

function_v0.doc:
Checks if a coordinator is active.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.
- `coordinator`: The address of the coordinator to check.

### Returns
`true` if the coordinator has been added to the beacon and the access to the collateral
is not paused, `false` otherwise.
function_v0.name: is_active_coordinator

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Represents the errors that can be emitted by the Beacon contract.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: BeaconError

cases.doc: The Coordinator is already supported by the Beacon.
cases.name: CoordinatorAlreadyExists

cases.doc: The Coordinator is not supported by the Beacon.
cases.name: CoordinatorNotFound

cases.doc: The access to the collateral is already paused.
cases.name: AlreadyPaused

cases.doc: The access to the collateral is not paused.
cases.name: NotPaused

cases.doc: When migration is attempted but not allowed due to upgrade state.
cases.name: MigrationNotAllowed
